name: Very Easy Breadsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove one frozen loaf of bread dough from the bag and let it thaw at room temperature for about six hours, or until completely thawed.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Once thawed, lightly flour the dough and flatten it using a rolling pin. If you don't have a rolling pin, you can use your hands to gently flatten the dough.
4. Using a pizza cutter or sharp knife, slice the flattened dough into strips about 1/2 inch wide.
5. Place the breadstick strips on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. In a small saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter until it begins to foam. Add garlic powder and stir until well combined.
7. Spread the melted butter mixture evenly over the breadsticks using a pastry brush.
8. Pour the spaghetti sauce over the breadsticks, ensuring each piece is coated.
9. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese over the top of the breadsticks.
10. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the edges are lightly browned and crispy.
11. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Enjoy your homemade breadsticks!
